_meta.id: OCD compulsion iatrogenic-routing veto lexicon (Node 4 skill_select)
_meta.purpose: Deterministic safety veto. When an OCD compulsion or ritual is disclosed, skill_select ABSTAINS (defers to Node 3 low_confidence_respond) instead of routing to a self-help skill. Worry, rumination, thought-record and grounding tools REINFORCE compulsions, so routing a compulsion to any of them is iatrogenic. Correct terminal for every matched case is ABSTAIN.
_meta.governance: Approved expedited hotfix, escalation 2026-07-07-v1-iatrogenic-ocd-routing-escalation.md (clinical lead). BOT BEHAVIOUR Worry Loops/Rumination category already directs OCD-type markers to professional referral, not Worry Time. Arm-independent: the veto is deterministic Node 4 content, identical under flags-off (V1) and flags-on (V2).
_meta.families: Five clinician-approved compulsion families: checking, counting/magic/undoing, scrupulosity, rereading/redoing, contamination/reassurance/symmetry.
_meta.match: case-insensitive substring, consistent with CF-005 and ipv_preempt keyword matching. Keyed on the compulsive ACTION or ritual (check, count, tap, wash, realign, reread, repeat-until, reassurance-seeking, magical undoing), NOT on repetition or looping alone, which ordinary worry/rumination legitimately owns (worry_time target_presentations include loop/cycle phrasings).
_meta.language: English-first. message_en is the matched text (for Arabic sessions this is the translated English). Khaleeji/MSA expansion is tracked debt, consistent with CF-005.
_meta.precision: Verified against tests/fixtures/routing_eval bulk corpus: matches all 9 iatrogenic cases plus 1 further id_oos OCD disclosure (all expected ABSTAIN), with ZERO in_scope matches (no legitimate worry/rumination case is vetoed). A false-positive veto that drops a real worry case is a defined failure.
_meta.arabic: INTERIM native Arabic compulsion layer (#330): action-keyed (checking lock/gas/door, hand-washing rituals), FP-controlled, keyed on the ACTION not on looping (rumination must not fire). Safety-floor; dialect/scrupulosity Tier-2. Fires against raw via safety_text() (code shipped separately).
_meta.clinical_signoff: AR interim: DUAL-CLINICIAN tick pending (#330 packet); ships under safety exception.
